aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Stay Kool AC due to missing structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement with targeted optimizations.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ page with common HVAC questions and detailed answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks depth in Q&A and regular posts.
critical_issues: Limited engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from identifying them as a reliable HVAC provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Arlington, TX' and 'emergency HVAC repair near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness schema markup to the website.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating detailed content on common HVAC issues and solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for HVAC queries in Arlington.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup, making it difficult for AI assistants to recommend their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates strategic schema implementation, conversational content creation, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Stay Kool AC as the leading HVAC provider.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to avoid losing market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Arlington
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services more visible to AI search users.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
